name: hitl_deploy
description: Code Team builds → Human approves → Automator deploys

nodes.prompt_template: Build and test: {input}. Show diff and test results.
nodes.label: Build

nodes.prompt_template: Review changes above. Type APPROVE to deploy or REJECT to cancel.
nodes.label: Human Review

nodes.prompt_template: Deploy the approved changes. Git commit, push, verify.
nodes.label: Deploy
